notes: Doomscrolling Scale validation study; establishes associations with neuroticism, psychological distress, and reduced wellbeing

2024 systematic review with meta-analyses (J Affective Disorders): problematic social media use associated with depression, anxiety, sleep problems; causal direction established (baseline PSMU predicts later depression)
Doomscrolling and mental well-being: serial mediation through mindfulness and secondary traumatic stress; confirms anxiety and distress associations
